page: Microsoft Azure EC16ads_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ECADSv5 family. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server includes 614 GB of local disk storage and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. The combination of dedicated AMD compute resources, a substantial memory footprint, and fast local storage capacity supports data-intensive operations. It does not include any integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the EC16ads_v5 offers a high density of memory relative to its virtual CPU count, making it a viable option for workloads requiring significant RAM without the expense of scaling up to higher vCPU tiers. The hardware configuration is designed for memory-intensive applications, database hosting, enterprise applications, and caching layers.
description: Microsoft Azure EC16ads_v5 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance from the ECADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It is configured with 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an AMD processor and 128.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. For storage, the instance includes 614 GB of local disk space and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource profile provides qualitative cost efficiency for memory-heavy workloads by offering a dense memory allocation relative to compute cores. The EC16ads_v5 is engineered for memory-intensive applications, database management systems, and enterprise workloads that require a balance of dedicated AMD processing power and substantial RAM capacity.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC16ads_v5 is a memory-optimized instance featuring 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128 GB of RAM, and 614 GB of local storage, designed for database and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC16ads_v5 is an x86_64 server with 16 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 614 GB local storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD compute cores, substantial RAM density, and high-capacity local storage.
